claim_risk: A single scaled run remains observational until repeated-seed verification.
expected_evidence_needed: Compare scaled logistic regression against the unscaled baseline.
rationale: Fake command backend selected action_logistic_regression_C-0p1_scale-True from the safe catalog for state state_002.
research_question: Maximize validation accuracy on sklearn breast_cancer under a small compute budget, while avoiding unsupported claims.
working_hypothesis: Feature scaling should improve or stabilize a scale-sensitive linear model.
